case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. KIM, CHOONG SIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 312 SERRANO AVENUE, SF, CA $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAYS SHALL BE PERMITTED. SEE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
